step.name: inventory-tools
step.action: List every tool the agent can invoke.

step.name: assign-tiers
step.action: Assign T0-T3 per tool; document rationale.

step.name: wire-gates
step.action: Configure T2 → signed-token verifier; T3 → two-person + cooling.

step.name: install-default-strict
step.action: Set default-tier=T3; new tools must be tier-assigned to execute.

step.name: audit-bypass
step.action: Stream break-glass events to security review queue.
